chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-1488 & 1489 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- C.P.No.D-1488 of 2025 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.7486/2025 3.For hearing of main case. C.P.No.D-1489 of 2025 1..For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.7480/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 29.05.2025 Mr.Shaneel Memon, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Zakir, Advocate for Respondent No.7 Learned counsel for the petitioners states that these petitions have been filed prior to filing of G.Ds and further states that the G.Ds are being filed and the respondents may be pleased to assess the same in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners, whereafter, the petitioners may remain at liberty to seek remedy if any. Learned counsel for the respondents has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these petitions may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Let copy of this order be placed in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
